programme.title: Camp Lazlo S1
programme.desc: Lazlo's friendship with Raj suffers because Raj has only one thing on his mind: marshmallows!

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S1

programme.title: Despicable Me 3

programme.title: The National Dog Show ('20)
programme.desc: From the Kennel Club of Philadelphia, this cherished competition for all dog lovers returns for the 17th year. Hosted by John O'Hurley, the event features 2,000 of the nation's leading canines, including the world’s largest, smallest and most exotic. Over 170 breeds strut their stuff with the hope of becoming this year's top dog. “The Dean” David Frei provides expert show commentary, and Mary Carillo chimes in as an adept sideline reporter for this ultimate canine showdown. But which dog will have their day, and which will leave with their tail between their legs? After all, there can only be one “Best in Show”.

programme.title: The Titan Games S2
programme.desc: The competition heads to the Western Region as new competitors push their bodies to the limit by battling opponents in unforgiving head-to-head challenges, designed by host and executive producer Dwayne Johnson. In this episode, competitors will compete in a best of three competition where the winner will move on to battle a Pro-Athlete Titan on Mt. Olympus, the consummate athletic test of speed, strength, agility and endurance. The top female competitor will face professional stuntwoman and “American Ninja Warrior” star Jessie Graff, while the top man will advance to compete against Super Bowl champion Victor Cruz. Cari Champion and Alex Mendez serve as commentators.

programme.desc: When an Olympic gold medalist boxer met a young boxer who falls victim to match fixing, he vows to start a boxing team at the school he teaches at and give his student a shot at the nationals.

programme.title: Dr. Cheon and the Lost Talisman
programme.desc: Dr. Cheon is a fake exorcist who cannot see or hear any ghosts. One day, a woman comes to Dr. Cheon, asking him to save her possessed younger sister...

programme.title: Single in Seoul
programme.desc: Yeong-Ho is a famous influencer who praises living a single life. Hyeon-Jin is an editor who is desperate about finding her partner. The two meets while working together for a book.

programme.title: Race to Freedom: Um Bok Dong
programme.desc: K-pop star Rain portrays Um Bok-dong, an unlikely hero in a government-organized bicycle race during the Japanese colonial era. Defeating Japanese rivals, his victories inspire locals and resistance fighters.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When their favorite zoo visitor loses his teddy bear, our gang goes on a wild adventure through New York City to return it to him - and in the process Marty learns that some things in life can't be found in an instruction manual.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a recipe for dandelion soup and a soup bowl, she discovers Kitty Fairy is sick! Gabby and Pandy make her some delicious dandelion soup and while she rests, they take care of her Garden. With the help of all the Gabby Cats, they water the Singing Flowers, help the Rainbow Kitty Bushes regain their color, and sing some fussy Itty Bitty Blossoms a lullaby. For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Kitty Fairy sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Feline popstar sensation Fluffy Flufferton is performing a concert at the Dollhouse Hotel, and Gabby unboxes tickets to see her! Gabby meets Fluffy and discovers that she’s afraid to try new things because she doesn’t want to make mistakes—why mess with perfection? But with the help of the Gabby Cats, Fluffy learns how to fail fantastically and be the most fluff-tastic version of herself. For our Cat of the Day segment, DJ Catnip sings a song about the Dollhouse Hotel.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: While the others care for baby dragons at the roost, Dak, Winger, Burple and Aggro come face-to-face with a grumpy old dragon on a dangerous island.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: The Rescue Riders plan to team up with the Slinkwings when an angry Grumblegard threatens Huttsgalor. But their old enemies may be up to new tricks.

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody and Sherman Show
programme.desc: Peabody and Sherman are surprised when all 25 time travel guests from each episode step out of the WABAC machine during the big season finale

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody and Sherman Show
programme.desc: When Peabody and Sherman kill comedy in Ancient Greece, they team up with their alter egos to defeat a cyborg version of Mrs. Hughes and fix history

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms S2
programme.desc: When the dragons fall victim to Buzzsaw’s poison darts, D struggles to keep a cool head and find a cure while others panic.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms S2
programme.desc: Tom and the riders “borrow” the bathysphere to rescue a dragon from the depths of the Giant Realm Sea.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: When Mort is abducted by "aliens", King Julien teams with Clover, Maurice and Hector to investigate why he's not the one being abducted.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: King Julien declares a war against butterflies to raise his kingdom's spirit, but when the village is destroyed he decides to hold a peace summit.

programme.title: The Adventures of Puss in Boots
programme.desc: Tired of the Mayor's needy cowardice, Puss tries to reassure him that he is a hero – but being “brave” quickly goes to the Mayor's head.

programme.title: The Adventures of Puss in Boots
programme.desc: The Golem, a giant clay enemy Puss has been outrunning for years, comes to San Lorenzo. With Artephius' help, Puss may be able to defeat his foe.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: When the Twins journey to the Northern Markets to fix their prized mace, they end up stumbling onto a secret project by Viggo and the Dragon Hunters.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: A huge storm hits Dragon's Edge causing the Dragons to spook and run off but when Astrid is blinded, Hiccup must lead her to Stormfly.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: Hiccup doesn't know who to trust when Viggo and Ryker each tell him that the other has gone rogue, and is sidetracked when a new dragon attacks.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: When the adults exclude the kids from their adult-only cave, the kids make their own much cooler cave, soon making the adults want to switch caves.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: When a freak lightning strike turns Thunk into a genius, Phil is thrilled to have someone likeminded on the farm, until the farm residents start asking Thunk for help with problems on the farm instead of him.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: Tired of the farm's feud with the neighboring punch monkeys, Ugga arranges a punch summit where the Bettermans and Croods will stay in the punch monkey village to learn how to all get along.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: The world’s worst baby is on the loose and Boss Baby, Tim and the team must find him before he turns the whole neighborhood against babies

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: When an unexpected kitten shows up on Boss Baby’s doorstep, they go head to head against the feline enemy

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: The Templetons head to a new family restaurant only to run into Bootsy Calico!

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Jun struggles to convince Tom to trust her faith in myths over the Book of Dragons when they venture to a place that his book seems to say is extremely dangerous.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Tom’s leadership abilities come into question by Eugene when his decisions lead to failure while attempting to confront Buzzsaw.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Tom and Thunder discover a baby Nightlight and must bring him back to Thunder’s home realm.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: There is more epic action and intrigue as Po and the Dragon Knights continue their quest to destroy the Tianshang weapons, but find themselves in treacherous waters when they are captured by pirates, one of which is out for revenge against Mr. Ping! The adventures lead them to London, where they are wanted by the Knights. Old enemies resurface and Blade will have to face one of her most challenging opponents—her mom. And somehow, Po finds himself in a chess tournament against the Queen of England!

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: There is more epic action and intrigue as Po and the Dragon Knights continue their quest to destroy the Tianshang weapons, but find themselves in treacherous waters when they are captured by pirates, one of which is out for revenge against Mr. Ping! The adventures lead them to London, where they are wanted by the Knights. Old enemies resurface and Blade will have to face one of her most challenging opponents—her mom. And somehow, Po finds himself in a chess tournament against the Queen of England!

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: There is more epic action and intrigue as Po and the Dragon Knights continue their quest to destroy the Tianshang weapons, but find themselves in treacherous waters when they are captured by pirates, one of which is out for revenge against Mr. Ping! The adventures lead them to London, where they are wanted by the Knights. Old enemies resurface and Blade will have to face one of her most challenging opponents—her mom. And somehow, Po finds himself in a chess tournament against the Queen of England!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: In order to get information on Sudarikov, Ms. Nowhere plans to interrogate his former rival: Shashi Dhar. But before Shashi offers up any information, he demands to be let out of prison for a day. Can he be trusted, or is this all part of a larger scheme?

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: While Tony, Layla, and Shashi are on the run from Sudarikov, they stumble upon a bunker that may hold the answers on how to defeat him. Meanwhile, the rest of the team is trapped in the spy plane with an AI car deadest on taking them out!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: The team manages to infiltrate Sudarikov’s base and learn that he’s building a fleet of AI cars equipped with Tony’s driving ability! When the AI cars come to life, our gang’s mission changes from trying to shut down the cars to just trying to survive.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jim is given the chance to see what life would be like if he had never picked up the Amulet

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jim must go to trial for releasing Gunmar from the Darklands

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When Gunmar marches for Heartsone Trollmarket, the Trollhunting team must save the remaining Trolls and face Gunmar before all is lost

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: During her last days on Earth, Aja decides to tell Steve the truth: she's an alien. But her plans are complicated when the Zerons abduct Aja, Steve and Krel. Meanwhile, Vex struggles with an impossible choice: saving the Royal teens or the Royal Cores.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: With the Mothership ready for liftoff, Aja and Krel celebrate their last day on Earth at Battle of the Bands. But their world is rocked when Zadra arrives with a startling revelation about Vex – and a new enemy threatens their departure.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When Omen hijacks the Mothership and Royal Cores, all seems lost for our heroes. The Royal heirs are able to defeat the killer Blank, but at a high cost.

programme.title: Voltron: Legendary Defender
programme.desc: With Zarkon consumed by his hunt for Lotor, Voltron gathers their coalition and prepares to strike in hopes of demolishing the evil Empire

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: Grug wants a day off from his honey-do-list so he subs in doppelganger Gurg/Eep and Thunk set out to sabotage Bulk and Sulk's "idea fair" project because they always win even though Snoot comes up with the ideas.

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: Thunk babysits Sandy and new baby Cliff to prove his responsible. Cliff is a jerk and keeps getting Sandy in trouble/Gran worries that Thunk isn't tough enough to survive to adulthood because he likes to hang out with old people, so she puts him through a series of toughness tests.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy
programme.desc: Determined to save her family home, Lucky signs up to race as a wild card in Rosemead's elite Junior Cup. But winning it all won't be easy.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: A wild horse Spirit and a soontobe city girl Lucky become friends in a frontier town

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: A group of Trux displaced by a volcano comes to Ty for help, and the gang has to work together to build a bridge to welcome their new guests.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Scare Scouts When Frankengymteacher forms a scout troop, Casper is the first to sign up. Boo! During a visit to Deedstown, Casper and his friends are shocked to find the humans dressed as scary creatures…it must Halloween!

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Abra-Ca-Deedstown From cleaning Ra's sarcophagus, to starring in Jimmy's magic act, Casper has been helping so much, he's exhausted. Shrinky Dust When magical Shrinky Dust falls into Norman the bully's hands, Casper and Jimmy find themselves on a hunt to get it back.

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: Rupert goes to meet Bill who seems very grumpy. Bill has grumble clouds over his head. Edward is the next one to have a dark, purple cloud over his head and he becomes very sad. Ping Pong tries a spell and the clouds break up and go away but then they return above everyone's head. Everyone gets the grumps except Rupert and Ming. Rupert and Ming try to make the others laugh and succeed with their disastrous magic show. Everyone starts laughing and they all cheer up!

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: Rupert, Ping Pong, Ming, Edward and Bill meet a young wind, Gustus. All of the grown up winds are too busy making weather and Gustus has no one to play with so he gets very bored and mischievous and causes chaos with his wind. Rupert shows Gustus some games he can play using his wind in a more productive way.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp has a new trick with his bubbles: he can have his friends put voice messages inside that you hear when you pop them. But when Pixie decides she doesn’t want the others to hear what’s in her bubble, the chase is on to rescue it! / Juniper is devastated when the traditional ceremony to celebrate her next level of spark achievement can’t happen. Kelp helps introduce a new tradition.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp writes a song about him and Scallop to perform at the unicorn show. But when it comes time, Scallop wants to keep the song “just for them”, leaving Kelp to come up with anew act- and fast! / The kids all visit the magical musical plant greenhouse on Unicorn Land. They each pick a plant to take care of, and for Kelp it’s a sad, almost dead plant that he falls in love with.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When the Gabby Cats get stuck in the leaves of an overgrown cupcake tree, it's up to Gabby, Pandy and cupcake-expert Cakey to work together to shrink the overgrown cupcake tree branch by branch--and to save CatRat from where he's stuck at the top! For our COTD segment, Cakey sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Kitty Fairy's garden is transformed into a fairy-riffic fairground for The Fairy Festival! At the festival, Gabby and Pandy meet an excitable little fairy named Luli-loo who joins them as they explore the festival. Luli-loo may not be the best at all the fair games, but she's never afraid to give it a go and learn from her mistakes!

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Marty accidentally “steals” a pair of slippers from a department store, he plans an elaborate “heist” to return them and learns in the end that it’s easier to own up to your mistakes than to cover them up.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When a litter of hedgehogs are temporarily relocated to the habitat, Alex, Marty, Melman, and Gloria become their “babysitters.” The mischievous hedgies quickly wreak total havoc in the habitat—and worse yet, Alex must sacrifice his plans to crash a photoshoot for the zoo’s pamphlet cover when the baby hedgies find the travel tunnels and sneak out for an urban adventure of their own! After an “Adventures in Babysitting”-style citywide hedgehog chase, our gang—with a newfound sense of responsibility—ultimately locates the hedgehogs and learn that babies can be a lot of work, but also a whole lot of fun. And Alex gets his dream pamphlet cover—surrounded by the adorable baby hedgies!

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp has a new trick with his bubbles: he can have his friends put voice messages inside that you hear when you pop them. programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When Rodney heads to the Community Center for Junior Security Cadet picture day, TZG secretly helps him stay neat and clean for the photo shoot. / When Luis worries about his first ever math test, TZG secretly helps steady his nerves.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: New girl in town Felicia shows off her robo-dog but it runs out of control, and TZG must secretly stop the barking bot from wreaking havoc. / When Lula starts gathering birthday wishes from folks around town, TZG secretly keeps her surprise party under wraps.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: Melman finds a lucky flower and is convinced that today will be his Best Day Ever! But when a series of unlucky events threaten to ruin his day, he’s faced with the choice to drown in his sorrows or “take back the day”!

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When the happy-go-lucky sea lions draw crowds away from his show, Alex decides that he needs to act like the Sea Lions. When Alex’s attempts to compete with them don’t bring back the crowds, he learns to be true to himself rather than try to be someone he's not (i.e. fish gotta swim, birds gotta fly, and lions gotta roar... and do backflips on land).

The content focuses on exciting new trends, fashion, and cultural topics across a range of disciplines both in China and abroad. The host presents various culture-related topics in a fun way while also doing some in-depth analysis to give viewers a fuller picture as to what is happening, and why it matters.

programme.title: General History Of China (S1)
programme.desc: Wu Zetian, the only female emperor in Chinese history, inherited the rule of Zhenguan and ushered in the prosperous Kaiyuan era.

programme.title: Dual Survival (S4)
programme.desc: This special episode of Dual Survival goes behind the scenes with the show's crew to get the scoop on who is leaving and who's moving on with a new partner.

programme.title: Ant Anstead: Born Mechanic (S2)
programme.desc: Ant and his dad find a “perfect” Woodie but there's a catch. There's no engine! The farmhouse is in danger of collapse due to rotten wooden beams.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch (S21)
programme.desc: Sig runs into freezing spray, forcing an emergency set. Keith goes toe to toe with a combative Australian greenhorn. Jake takes a risky strategy.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch (S21)
programme.desc: Water in his fuel causes Jake to have a psychotic episode. Keith fires a dishonest deckhand, ending in a final confrontation at the airport bar.

programme.title: Expedition X (S6)

programme.title: L.A. Confidential
programme.desc: Amidst corruption, murder and the glamour of famous movie stars, three police officer fight to uncover the truth of a brutal mass murder.

programme.title: E.T.,The Extra-Terrestrial
programme.desc: Captivating audiences of all ages, this timeless story follows the unforgettable journey of a lost alien and the 10-year-old boy he befriends.

programme.title: It Happened One Night
programme.desc: A spoiled heiress falls in love with the cynical newspaperman she enlists to help her escape her domineering father.

programme.title: Legion
programme.desc: When God loses faith in mankind he sends his Legion of angels to wipe out the human race for the second time. Man's only hope lies in a group of misfits holed up in a desert diner. With the help of the Archangel Michael, these strangers must deliver a baby they soon realize is the second coming and their last chance at redemption.

programme.title: Irma La Douce
programme.desc: In Paris, an ex-cop falls in love with a prostitute, and tries to get her out of that life by paying for all of her time.

programme.title: Puss in Boots

programme.desc: Novelist Dashiell Hammett's legendary San Francisco private detective, Sam Spade, becomes enmeshed with a deadly band of international thieves who will lie, double cross and murder when he accepts an assignment from a beautiful but Dangerous Female.
